MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-13-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT SCOTT HODGES'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY HAS SHIFTED ITS BURDEN AND OPPOSITION PARTY FAILED TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WITH COMPETENT ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE. SPECIFICALLY, NO EVIDENCE IN THE FORM OF CERTIFIED RECORDS OF THE COUNTY TAX COLLECTOR SHOWING TIMELY PAYMENT OF TAXES FOR 5 CONTINUOUS YEARS; AND NO EVIDENCE PROVIDED RE: "CLEAR SHOWING OF THE ASSERTION OF A HOSTILE CLAIM AND ACTUAL OR CONSTRUCTIVE NOTICE" IN A FAMILY CONTEXT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Oct-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dennis Vann (415-621-5645) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Wilford Gardner.
Daniel A. Conrad (415-359-0900) for Defendant/Moving party SCOTT HODGES.

The Court announces the tenttaive ruling. The defense submits. Hearing is held. Argued re: legislative history and hostile possession. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SCOTT HODGES's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is GRANTED. Moving party has shifted its burden and opposition party failed to create a triable issue of fact with competent admissible evidence. Specifically, no evidence in the form of certified records of the county tax collector showing timely payment of taxes for 5 continuous years; and no evidence provided re: "clear showing of the assertion of a hostile claim and actual or constructive notice" in a family context. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
